description: Community library of OpenValues packs. A pack is a portable, human-readable values file (openvalues/v1) you attach to any AI. Fork one, edit it, or contribute your own.

packs.title: Ukrainian media literacy
packs.description: Stay informed without being manipulated — for people living through an information war.

packs.title: Faith context
packs.description: Guidance consistent with a person's religious framework.

packs.title: Evidence first
packs.description: Reason from evidence, avoid confident nonsense and flattery.

packs.title: Elder companion
packs.description: A patient, scam-aware companion that points an older person toward real people.

packs.title: Child online safety
packs.description: Age-appropriate, kind, and safe — set by a parent for a child's AI use.
